BudgetRequest.description: Optional per-run ceilings; omitted fields fall back to the run defaults.
BudgetRequest.title: BudgetRequest

EdgeKind.description:
Knowledge-graph edge types (FR-2.5): a module ``defines`` a symbol and
``imports`` a target; a symbol ``calls`` another and a type ``inherits`` a
base. Directed source→target.
EdgeKind.title: EdgeKind

GraphNeighborResponse.description: One node reached from the queried symbol, with how it was reached.
GraphNeighborResponse.title: GraphNeighborResponse

Role.description: RBAC roles, strictly ordered: each includes the ones below it.
Role.title: Role

SearchHitResponse.description:
One hybrid-search result with full provenance (FR-2.3).

``suspect`` surfaces the index-time injection screen so a client renders a
warning; ``source`` reports how the hit was found ('hybrid' or 'symbol').
SearchHitResponse.title: SearchHitResponse

SymbolKind.description:
Language-neutral symbol categories. Each language maps its native node
types onto this set (docs/06); `import` captures every dependency form.
`module` is never a parsed symbol — it labels the per-file node the M5
graph hangs ``defines``/``imports`` edges on.
SymbolKind.title: SymbolKind
